_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create a forensically sound duplicate of the evidence (i.e., forensic image) that ensures the original evidence is not unintentionally modified, to use for data recovery and analysis processes. This includes, but is not limited to, hard drives, floppy diskettes, CD, PDA, mobile phones, GPS, and all tape formats.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives and data protection, privacy, and ethical obligations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-001 (RC, cosine: 0.360), RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.360).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.410). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, cd, create, diskettes, drives, duplicate] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, conflicts, ethical, identify, monetization, objectives] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.836 (P=0.812, R=0.861). R exceeds P by 0.048 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 48 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Create a forensically sound duplicate of the evidence (i.e., forensic image) tha" and "Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.395 ≈ STS 0.410 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [analysis, cd, create, diskettes, drives, duplicate]. WIDAI-only: [ability, conflicts, ethical, identify, monetization, objectives].
